rationale: Introduce a forall determinism lemma keyed on `send_single_message(pre_self_@, p, m@, dst@, sm, params)`: any satisfying (p, sm) is uniquely characterized (either the no-room `post==pre, sm==None` branch, or the deterministic `Some(expected_msg) + insert` branch). The trigger then fires on the `send_single_message` calls baked into the ensures of both runs, lifting `r1@ == r2@` and `post1_self_@ == post2_self_@` at the abstract level so z3 can chain to the det-equal conclusion.
